app.name: Open Persona
app.tagline: Typed-memory AI personas with a tier-routed runtime.

scaffold.title: Open Persona — web app
scaffold.subtitle: Scaffold is live. Auth, personas, chat, runs, and authoring land in the spec-09 tasks.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Your typed-memory agents, ready when you are.
home.subtitleNew: Welcome to Open Persona — let's build your first agent.

onboarding.title: Give your AI a self worth trusting.
onboarding.body: Describe a persona in a sentence and the authoring flow drafts the rest — a typed identity, a worldview, and episodic memory.

identity.title: Identity is data
identity.body: Name, worldview, self-facts, and constraints live in typed, versioned stores — not buried in a prompt you can't inspect.

tools.title: Transparent tools
tools.body: Every tool call and its result stream inline, collapsed by default. Transparency without the noise — no black box.

runs.title: Agentic runs
runs.body: Hand off a task and watch the plan-act-reflect loop unfold step by step, answering its questions as it works.

routing.title: Tier-routed
routing.body: Each turn runs on the right model — small, mid, or frontier — so you spend on power only when a turn needs it.

command.placeholder: Search personas, conversations, or jump to…

settings.title: Settings
settings.accountHint: Manage your account from the avatar menu in the header.
settings.creditsHint: Credits are spent per turn, by model tier.
settings.lowBalance: Credits running low — top up soon.
settings.creditsExhaustedHint: Top up your balance or contact support to keep using premium tiers.
settings.themeHint: Light, dark, or follow your system.
settings.tierBadgesHint: Show which tier answered each turn in chat.
settings.languageHint: English ships now; the pseudo-locale verifies full i18n coverage.
settings.aboutAttribution: Open Persona is built on the persona-core library (Apache 2.0). See docs and source for more.
settings.usageEmpty: No usage yet — start a conversation or a run.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Every chat you've had with your personas.
conversations.emptyHint: Open a persona and start a chat.
conversations.noMatches: No conversations match the current filters.
conversations.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete {title}? The conversation and its messages will be removed.

personas.title: Personas
personas.subtitle: Your typed-memory agents.
personas.emptyHint: Describe one in a sentence and the authoring flow drafts the rest.

library.appsTools: {count, plural, one {# app & tool} other {# apps & tools}}
library.chats: {count, plural, =0 {No chats} one {# chat} other {# chats}}
library.duplicateConfirm: Duplicate {name} as a fresh template? Memory, conversations, and identity colour all start over.
library.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete {name}? This removes the persona definition, memory, and all conversations.

detail.routingHint: Each turn is routed to a right-sized model automatically — small → frontier. The tier is never set per persona.

memory.heading: Typed memory
memory.identityDesc: Who they are — name, role, language: the spine of the character.
memory.selfFactsDesc: What the persona has learned about itself over time.
memory.worldviewDesc: Its stances and views — what keeps the voice consistent.
memory.episodicDesc: Recalled and compacted from past conversations each turn.
memory.episodicConversations: {count, plural, =0 {No conversations yet} one {# conversation} other {# conversations}}

artifacts.subtitle: Everything this persona has been given or has produced.
artifacts.emptyHint: Files you upload and outputs your personas generate will appear here.
artifacts.noMatches: No artifacts match the current filters.

runs.taskPlaceholder: Describe a task for {name} to carry out…

author.describeHint: One or two sentences. The frontier model drafts the identity, worldview, and constraints — you refine from there.
author.describePlaceholder: e.g. A warm but rigorous Norwegian tenancy-law assistant who never gives binding legal advice…
author.starterSubtitle: Pick a flagship starter and make it yours, or describe your own — no waiting for a draft.
author.directSubtitle: Edit any field, then create. No authoring wait — your edits become the persona directly.
author.quickFullEditorHint: Add tools, skills, voice, and routing in the full editor — your edits carry over.

gallery.title: Describe your persona
gallery.subtitle: Write a sentence or two and generate, or start from one of the examples below.
gallery.startScratchHint: An empty persona you fill in yourself

author.authorError: Authoring failed. Try rephrasing your description.
author.rateLimited: Too many authoring requests — wait a moment and try again.
author.name: Name
author.yamlInvalid: Invalid YAML — the form keeps its last valid state. {error}
author.questionsHint: Answer one to improve the persona. You can refine up to {max} times.
author.refineLimitReached: Refinement limit reached — edit the form or YAML directly from here.
author.capabilityCapHint: Around 10 keeps the persona focused and accurate.
author.suggestEmpty: No suggestions — the current set looks good.
author.suggestError: Could not fetch suggestions right now.
author.byoSubtitle: Add your own MCP servers and assign them to this persona.
author.byoEmpty: You have no MCP servers yet.
author.byoAddError: Could not add the server (check the URL — https only, public host).
author.voiceDescription: The voice this persona speaks with on a call.

routing.title: Model routing
routing.description: Choose how this persona picks a model for each turn.
routing.enableHint: Pick the best model within the chosen tier each turn, instead of always using the tier's default. Off keeps the rule-based default.
routing.priorityHint: What to optimise for when choosing a model.
routing.presetCostHint: Favour the cheapest model that still fits.
routing.presetCustomHint: Custom weights set in Advanced (or raw YAML).
routing.budgetHint: Optional spend caps in cents. Leave blank for no cap.
routing.perTurnHint: Hard cap — a turn that no model fits will fail.
routing.perSessionHint: Soft cap — favours cheaper models as you approach it.
routing.perDayWarning: Per-day caps aren't enforced yet — setting one stops this persona from running with intelligent routing. Use per-turn or per-session instead.

author.avatarHint: PNG, JPG or WebP. A square image works best.
author.avatarUploadError: Couldn't upload that image — try a different file.

chat.error: Something went wrong while streaming. The conversation was reloaded.

attach.label: Attach file
attach.imageDisabled: Image attachments aren't available on this deployment.
attach.openConversationFirst: Open a conversation to attach documents.
attach.sendBlocked: {count, plural, one {# image failed to upload} other {# images failed to upload}} — retry or remove

validation.per_message_image_cap: You can attach at most {cap} images per message

resultBlock.showFull: Show {count, plural, one {# more line} other {# more lines}}

routing.whyFallback: tier default — live model data was unavailable

budget.label: Budget
budget.approaching: Approaching the session cap — favouring cheaper models
budget.perDayUnenforced: Per-day cap set but not enforced yet

voice.droppedBody: The connection dropped. You can reconnect.

mic_denied.title: Microphone blocked
mic_denied.body: Enable microphone access in your browser or system settings, then try again.

mic_missing.title: No microphone found
mic_missing.body: Connect a microphone to call with this persona.

mic_busy.title: Microphone in use
mic_busy.body: Another app is using your microphone. Close it and try again.

unauthorized.title: Session expired
unauthorized.body: Sign in again to start the call.

credits_exhausted.title: Out of voice credits
credits_exhausted.body: You’ve used your voice credits. Top up to keep calling.

not_found.title: Persona unavailable
not_found.body: This persona isn’t available for calls right now.

service_unavailable.title: Voice service unavailable
service_unavailable.body: The voice service is unavailable right now. Please try again in a moment.

unknown.title: Couldn’t start the call
unknown.body: Something went wrong. Please try again.

voice.voicesUnavailable: Voice selection is unavailable right now.
